states.name: PickUp()
states.description: Pick up the nearest box (requested by the human).

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_stage())
states.description: Move to the observed staging position before the final drop.

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_drop())
states.description: Proceed to the final drop location near the human.

states.name: PutDown()
states.description: Put the box down for the human to package.

transitions.description: Ensure the box is in possession before moving.
